title: Minimal-Exchange
description: A mod inspired by the equivalent exchange series with a focus on balance and minimalism
body:
A mod inspired by equivalent exchange 3 with lots of features from the previous versions

## About

The mod is very minimalistic and focuses around the transmutation stone and various utility items all utilizing Matter. It was a concious decision not to include a transmutation table and/or regular armor and tools for balancing reasons. Instead this mod focuses on bringing unique and interesting features from the old equivalent exchange mods back, while coming up with fun concepts itself.

The mod is still in its early stages and prone to bugs.

## Features

The mod currently includes:
- The Transmutation Stone
- Destruction Catalyst
- Alchemy Bag
- Exchange Pylon

## Discord

Discord for help and discussion: [https://discord.gg/saPrxkwpEa](https://discord.gg/saPrxkwpEa)
